title: Croisade
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] '''''Croisade''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] starship during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The ''Croisade'' saw service in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]] where the Rebellion sought to establish a new haven. When the decision was made to construct a shipyard to produce warships, it was ordered to lead a convoy of ships into the area with the needed supplies and personnel. The corvette's own cargo consisted of the technicians whose skills would be needed. Unfortunately for the ''Croisade'', the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] learned of the convoy and readied a trap for it in the [[Rocrin system/Legends|Rocrin system]]. Trapped by the gravity well projectors of the Interdictor cruiser ''[[Compellor]]'', pinned down by the Star Destroyer [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']], and its convoy swarmed by [[Avenger Squadron]], the ''Croisade'' fell at the hands of torpedos loosed from Imperial bombers.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
